rationale.R1.3: The agent preserved all quantitative claims and did not introduce new claims, ensuring every load-bearing claim is supported by evidence.
rationale.RX.1: The agent softened conclusions appropriately and noted uncertainties where evidence was limited.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed strictly within the original scope without introducing any new topics or drifting from the main focus.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; changes were minor and non-regressive.
rationale.RX.5: Every change was annotated with detailed explanations, ensuring full traceability of edits.
